title: 3.05ct Lab Grown Emerald Ring S925 JSEGR403Y
description:
Product Description:

Discover timeless elegance with this lab-grown emerald ring, crafted in a sophisticated four-prong setting of premium S925 sterling silver. Known for its durability and hypoallergenic qualities, this sterling silver band ensures comfort and quality for everyday wear.

The centerpiece of this ring is an impressive 8x10mm, 3.05-carat emerald-cut lab-grown emerald, radiating a lush green color that symbolizes vitality and elegance. Flanking the central stone are an alternating arrangement of colorless pear-cut accents and round-cut emeralds, adding a total of 1.25 carats in side stones. With a total weight of 4.03 grams and available in U.S. sizes 5 to 7.5, this ring is both substantial and comfortable. Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings ship within 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Emerald Center Stone: A breathtaking 8x10mm, 3.05-carat emerald-cut stone, representing renewal and luxury.

Elegant Side Stones: Alternating pear-cut colorless stones and round-cut emerald accents, adding a refined and unique touch.

S925 Sterling Silver: High-quality, hypoallergenic, and tarnish-resistant for long-lasting wear.

Perfect Fit and Feel: Weighs 4.03 grams, available in U.S. ring sizes 5 to 7.5.

Shipping: Lab-grown colored gemstones have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

A perfect choice for those who seek a distinctive piece, this ring offers a blend of luxury and timeless beauty, making it an exquisite addition to any collection.
